Rule_1.title: Rule 1: Scope of Rules
Rule_1.description: These rules govern the procedure in all civil actions.

Rule_12.title: Rule 12: Defenses and Objections
Rule_12.description: How to raise defenses and objections.

Rule_401.title: Rule 401: Test for Relevant Evidence
Rule_401.description: Evidence is relevant if it has any tendency to make a fact more or less probable.

Rule_402.title: Rule 402: General Admissibility of Relevant Evidence
Rule_402.description: Relevant evidence is admissible unless otherwise provided by law.

filing_deadline.time_limit: 30 days from the date of service.

discovery_deadline.time_limit: 90 days from the date of the initial scheduling conference.
